markets.question: Tabur vs. Ghibaudo: Set 1 Games O/U 10.5
markets.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Clement Tabur and Antoine Ghibaudo in the Cherbourg, scheduled for March 11 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed in the first set equals or exceeds 11. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
Any first-set tiebreak counts as one (1) game toward the total.
If the first set is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins, or delayed beyond 7 days without commencement, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official Challenger results.
markets.groupItemTitle: Cherbourg: Clement Tabur vs Antoine Ghibaudo Set 1 O/U 10.5

events.title: Cherbourg: Clement Tabur vs Antoine Ghibaudo
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Clement Tabur and Antoine Ghibaudo in the Cherbourg, scheduled for March 11 at 3:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Clement Tabur' if Clement Tabur advances against Antoine Ghibaudo.

This market will resolve to 'Antoine Ghibaudo' if Antoine Ghibaudo advances against Clement Tabur.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the ATP Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Tabur vs. Ghibaudo: Match O/U 23.5
markets.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Clement Tabur and Antoine Ghibaudo in the Cherbourg, scheduled for March 11 2026.

All tiebreaks—including any Champions/Super tiebreak—count as one (1) game toward the total.

This market will resolve to 'Lanlana Tararudee' if Lanlana Tararudee advances against Caty McNally.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.
